title: Phoenix Duels Lite
description: PhoenixDuels, is a revolutionary plugin that simplifies duels. Say goodbye to outdated and confusing plugins.

<summary>Image transcription</summary>

# PHOENIX DUELS - THE ULTIMATE DUELING PLUGIN!
Bring exciting battles to your server with PhoenixDuels.
PhoenixDuels makes it easy for you to set up and manage duels for your players. With a user-friendly in-game editor, you can quickly create custom arenas, set match rules, and reward players for their victories. PhoenixDuels is the perfect plugin to add more excitement and fun to your server, keeping players active and entertained!
## Feature sections:
### Betting
Let your players bet their items or money in exciting duels!
### Solo & Party
Engage players with solo and up to 4 party size fights. Perfect for team-based duels!
Inventories/kits
Players can battle with their own inventory or choose from custom premade one!
### Lots of Rules
With over 20 rules, you can create unique duel modes and take customization to the next level.
### User Friendly
Enjoy an intuitive interface for simple management and customization of duels.
### No Dependencies
PhoenixDuels do not require any hard dependencies. Just download and use it.
### Duel invitation
### Item betting
### Betting Items
### Inventory
### Party system
Form parties with your friends and compete together using our party system, adding a new level of excitement to every duel and making the gameplay more engaging!
## Rules & Modes
Customize over 30+ Rules
Crystal PVP
Sumo
UHC Game
Boxing (Paid Addon)
Bed Fight (Paid Addon)
Spleef (Paid Addon)
And many more rules to try out. The possibilities are endless!
## Main Features
### Main Features
Our rules system lets you customize match behaviour making each match more dynamic and personalized. You can create modes such as Soup, Sumo, Boxing, UHC and many more.
Left column
Arena Regeneration - Regenerate the arena to its initial state.
Multiple Player Types - Available modes: 1v1 & Party (2v2 - 4v4).
Restore Inventory - After a duel, players will get their items back.
Spectator Mode - Allow users to watch other players in this mode.
Queue System - Allows users to queue for matches.
Extensive Wiki - Well detailed wiki with extensive details.
GUI Based - Everything is GUI based via our editor.
Direct Duel - Allow users to /duel each other.
Addon Compatibility - Ability to enhance the plugin with new features.
Bedrock Compatibility - Allow your bedrock users to enjoy dueling.
Customizable Commands - Run commands for winners, losers, start & end.
Premade Gamemodes - Play: Crystal, Soup, UHC, Classic and others.
## In-Game Editor
The in-game editor lets you configure almost everything without manually editing configuration files. It's designed to be intuitive so you can configure and manage your arenas without technical hassle.
## Reviews
What people say about this plugin:
### SpoiBoy ★★★★★
So far, this has been an amazing plugin for my private SMP. My friends and I have used it a ton, and we all agree it’s the best duels plugin we’ve tried.
### leutzw ★★★★★ 
This is an absolutely amazing plugin, everything works flawlessly and it has really improved the experience on my server.
### BananaJ ★★★★★ 
I have been using the plugin for a while and had the time to use it properly as well, I must say this is such a great and advanced plugin.

If you need assistance with our plugin make sure to [join our discord](https://myphoenixstore.com/media/discord)
</details>
